description: Curated government scheme fact-cards. Structured facts (eligibility, documents, how to apply, official link), not parsed statute. Each carries scheme provenance: governing authority and official scheme URL in place of a section number.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
schemes.governing_authority: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
schemes.facts: Eligibility: EWS/LIG/MIG households without a pucca house. Documents: Aadhaar, income proof, bank details. How to apply: online at pmaymis.gov.in or at a Common Service Centre.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana
schemes.facts: Eligibility: families identified in the SECC database. Benefit: health cover up to Rs 5 lakh per family per year. How to apply: verify eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or a listed hospital.
